title: T-028 — UI: shipping_settings_page (SHIP-023) (allocation/labels/dispatch tabs) (11-shipping-h)
prompt:
# T-028 — Shipping Settings page

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-023 Shipping Settings Hub, §11 V-SHIP-PACK-03 GS1 prefix 7-10 digits, §12 D365 push config, §6 D-SHP-19
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-023
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:536-648 (shipping_settings_page)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component admin settings hub with tabs (Allocation / Labels / Dispatch / D365). Settings persist into 02-SETTINGS-owned `shipping_config` JSONB (consumer of 02-SETTINGS §9.1 tenant L2 config infra).

## GS1 prefix source
All SSCC label settings read `organizations.gs1_company_prefix` from the organizations table (02-settings). Always read from organizations table; do not store in env config or code constants.

## Implementation contract
1. `/(shipping)/settings/page.tsx` renders shipping_settings_page (doc-screens.jsx:536-648). Tabs: Allocation, Labels, Dispatch, D365 (4 tabs).
2. Allocation tab fields: default_pick_strategy (FEFO/FIFO), allergen_segregation_strictness ('strict'/'advisory'), reservation_ttl_hours.
3. Labels tab fields: gs1_company_prefix (V-SHIP-PACK-03 — must be 7-10 digits; P1 enforces exactly 7), sscc_extension_digit, default_zpl_template, multi_language_packing_slip (disabled, P2 per BL-SHIP-12).
4. Dispatch tab fields: default_carrier (Combobox sourced from T-027 carriers), variance_tolerance_pct (catch weight, V-SHIP-PACK-04 P1 fallback if product doesn't define), manual_dispatch_only (toggle defaults true per D-SHP-19).
5. D365 tab fields: d365_shipping_push_enabled (feature flag), retry_cadence (5m/30m/2h/12h/24h), dlq_inspector deep-link (T-029).
6. Save calls `saveShippingSettings()` Server Action — UPSERTs to `shipping_config` table (this task introduces if not yet present; owned by 02-SETTINGS §9.1 infrastructure pattern) keyed by org_id; outbox `shipping.settings.updated`. Permission `ship.so.create` (admin shorthand) OR existing 02-settings.org.update.
7. HAZMAT + EUDR flag UIs shown disabled (BL-SHIP-13 P2).
8. Four states + i18n `shipping.settings.*`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/settings/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/settings/_components/settings-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/settings.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/__tests__/settings.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/settings/__tests__/settings-tabs.test.tsx [create]
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_config.sql [create — shipping_config table if not yet present in 02-SETTINGS]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify — ShippingSettingsUpdated]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to doc-screens.jsx:536-648, then 4-tab layout (Allocation / Labels / Dispatch / D365) + per-tab field set match — RTL + Playwright screenshot.
2. Given gs1_company_prefix is entered with 6 digits, when Zod runs, then V-SHIP-PACK-03 error appears and submit disabled.
3. Given saveShippingSettings succeeds, when DB inspected, then shipping_config row UPSERTed for org with the new values; outbox shipping.settings.updated emitted.
4. Given user lacks ship.so.create (admin shorthand), when page renders, then settings fields are read-only.
5. Given HAZMAT/EUDR toggles render, when state is checked, then they are disabled with P2 tooltip (BL-SHIP-13).
6. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest for settings Server Action + RTL for UI + Playwright; AC 1-6.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run shipping/settings`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-settings.spec.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass V-SHIP-PACK-03 gs1 prefix validation.
- Do not implement HAZMAT/EUDR features (BL-SHIP-13 P2).
- Do not implement multi-language packing slip toggle live (BL-SHIP-12 P2).
- Do not allow saveShippingSettings without ship.so.create OR settings.org.update permission.
- Do not regress accessibility.
- Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:536-648` (shipping_settings_page). Verify all 4 tabs field sets match prototype. Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.

pipeline_inputs.description: SHIP-023 Shipping Settings hub with 4 tabs (Allocation/Labels/Dispatch/D365) + shipping_config persistence consumer of 02-SETTINGS infrastructure.
pipeline_inputs.details: shipping_config table follows 02-SETTINGS §9.1 tenant L2 config pattern. gs1_company_prefix validated 7-10 digits (V-SHIP-PACK-03). HAZMAT/EUDR/multi-lang toggles disabled P1 (P2 per BL-SHIP-12/13).
out_of_scope: Do not implement multi-language packing slip (P2 BL-SHIP-12).
cross_module_dependencies: 01-npd/T-001 (product FG SSOT — variance_tolerance_pct + allergen attributes; coverage hygiene per R3 audit 2026-05-14)
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:536-648, then 4-tab layout + per-tab field sets match prototype (structural + visual parity checklist per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY).

Given gs1_company_prefix entered with 6 digits, when Zod runs, then V-SHIP-PACK-03 error appears and submit disabled; AND given saveShippingSettings succeeds, when DB inspected, then shipping_config row UPSERTed with organizations.gs1_company_prefix from 02-settings; outbox shipping.settings.updated emitted.

Given user lacks ship.so.create / settings.org.update, when page renders, then fields are read-only; AND given HAZMAT/EUDR toggles render, when state checked, then disabled with P2 tooltip (BL-SHIP-13).
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
test_strategy: RED: vitest for Server Action + RTL for UI + Playwright trace asserting AC 1-6.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass V-SHIP-PACK-03 gs1 prefix validation.
Do not implement multi-language toggle live.
Do not allow save without admin permission.
Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
